ops.body: P2b SHIPPED as 9b705434 (CI green; ship auto-rebased onto moved main). The leg-intent cutover: plan.legs replaces trip_type/hybrid/return outright; journeys are arbitrary chains (multi-city, positioning, N-leg stitches) in the same deterministic engine; canonical graph and journeys byte-identical to the old engine (pinned); 1002 pytest + 50 walker tests at ship, full gate green. Ten adversarial rounds across four stages: S1 schema+compile fold (5 rounds: chaining contract, validation hardening, region vocab correction, polish), S2 retrieval keying (3 rounds ending in a structural simplification — unconditional pairs endpoint_source + one resolution order — that closed the whole permutation matrix), S3 chain-builder (lead-quota honesty, two-leg exhaustive composition with disclosed beam, leg-type-generalized fit), S4 walker grammar + tree-wide fixture cutover (+1 closing round: LEG_SPEC derived-label bound, SKILL example swap, reference-doc factual fixes). Offline verification: canonical/multi-city/positioning all compile; v2 rejects loudly; the one residual (legless-plan raw KeyError in expand) fixed at main level with a pin. Design doc captured. P4 inherits: SKILL.md prose reorientation + planning.md lines ~15/52/56. P3 next: scout, plan.tuning (incl. beam lift), manual chains, optional legs, partial-chain leads.
